note: Mathlib/Analysis/PSeries.lean:360-362, docstring '**Divergence of the Harmonic Series**' — Tendsto (fun n => ∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, (1/(i+1):ℝ)) atTop atTop; the divergence theorem for the harmonic series, plus harmonic : ℕ → ℚ (partial sums) in NumberTheory/Harmonic/Defs.lean:22.

Mathlib/Analysis/ODE/Basic.lean:54-55, def IsIntegralCurve (γ : ℝ → E) (v : ℝ → E → E) : Prop := ∀ t, HasDerivAt γ (v t (γ t)) t — the definition of γ being a solution to the (possibly time-dependent, vector-valued) first-order ODE γ' = v(t,γ); Mathlib/Analysis/ODE/ also has Picard–Lindelöf existence/uniqueness (ExistUnique.lean, PicardLindelof.lean).
